summary: Fix: Removed unused `index` prop from `TestimonialCard.astro` Props interface and destructuring. This prop was introduced in a previous implementation (testimonials-ux-line-clamp-modal) but was never referenced anywhere in the component template or script, causing a ts(6133) TypeScript hint on line 27.
Fix: Removed the corresponding `index={i}` prop pass-through in `Testimonials.astro` (line 132) since `TestimonialCard` no longer declares or uses the prop.
Phase Validation — Build: npm run build — 7 pages built, 0 errors.
Phase Validation — TypeScript check: npx astro check — 0 errors, 0 warnings, 10 hints (down from 11; the 10 remaining hints are pre-existing and unrelated to testimonials work).

typescript_issues_resolved.diagnostic: ts(6133): 'index' is declared but its value is never read.
typescript_issues_resolved.fix: Removed `index?: number` from Props interface and `index = 0` from destructuring assignment.
typescript_issues_resolved.root_cause: The `index` prop was added in the testimonials-ux-line-clamp-modal implementation (issue-10) as a pass-through from Testimonials.astro but was never wired up to any template expression or script logic.

typescript_issues_resolved.diagnostic: Passed `index={i}` to TestimonialCard which no longer accepts the prop.
typescript_issues_resolved.fix: Removed `index={i}` from the TestimonialCard JSX invocation inside the testimonials.map() loop.

pre_existing_hints_unchanged: src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro:390 — script treated as is:inline due to attribute (astro 4000)
src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro:220 — script treated as is:inline due to attribute (astro 4000)

validation.astro_check: PASSED — 0 errors, 0 warnings, 10 hints (1 fewer than before fix)
